content:
Context # Project details: Student project designed in collaboration with Jenna Emperador and Colvin Wong Timeline: 3 weeks Role: UX Researcher, UX Designer, Mobile App Designer Tools: Figma Brief # Our challenge was to design a new feature for Buddy that would introduce a fresh persona-driven experience and create stronger long-term motivation for users.
Problem # Buddy has a post-onboarding retention problem: users are willing to try the app and connect their financial accounts, but many stop engaging because they do not feel motivated to continue budgeting. The experience does not yet create enough ongoing value, clarity, or encouragement to turn initial setup into a lasting habit.
Solution # We introduced a Challenges section that motivates users to keep budgeting through small achievable goals, progress tracking, and a stronger sense of accomplishment. This helps Buddy create ongoing value beyond account connection and supports the habit building needed for long term retention.
Process # Research # Through competitor analysis and intended user interviews, we found that the biggest challenge was not getting users to download the app or connect their bank accounts and cards, but getting them to keep using it afterward. Many users described budgeting as complicated, time-consuming, and difficult to maintain, especially when it requires ongoing manual effort and offers little immediate reward.
Even after setup, users often lacked a clear sense of progress, motivation, or long-term value. Budgeting started to feel like a chore rather than a helpful habit, which made it easy to disengage. This showed that Buddy needed to create more ongoing encouragement and a clearer feeling of achievement if it wanted to sustain retention.
End Result # Challenge-based budgeting goals Visible progress tracking Short-term rewards and motivation A clearer sense of momentum after onboarding
summary: Context # Project details: Student project designed in collaboration with Jenna Emperador and Colvin Wong Timeline: 3 weeks Role: UX Researcher, UX Designer, Mobile App Designer Tools: Figma Brief # Our challenge was to design a new feature for Buddy that would introduce a fresh persona-driven experience and create stronger long-term motivation for users.
title: Buddy Challenge Feature Design

content: I create clear, thoughtful digital and print experiences with an emphasis on structure, usability, and visual restraint.

content:
Kenzie Ward # I am a designer from New Zealand based in Vancouver, currently studying at Simon Fraser University.
My work spans UX/UI and print design, with a focus on simple, intentional layouts and visual communication that feels clear and grounded.
This site is intentionally minimal for now and will grow as I add projects, process, and more detailed case studies.
summary: Kenzie Ward # I am a designer from New Zealand based in Vancouver, currently studying at Simon Fraser University.
